buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-sm font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase px-6 py-3 shadow-md transition-all
buttons.accent: bg-amber-500 text-slate-900 hover:bg-amber-400 rounded-sm font-bold tracking-wide uppercase px-6 py-3 shadow-md transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.outline: border-2 border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:border-slate-900 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-sm font-medium uppercase tracking-wide

cards.style: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

inputs.style: h-12 rounded-sm border-slate-300 focus:border-amber-500 focus:ring-amber-500 bg-slate-50

hero.description: Left 60% text/CTA, Right 40% Image. Strong headline in Barlow Condensed.

items: col-span-1 md:col-span-2 bg-slate-900 text-white p-8 rounded-xl
col-span-1 md:col-span-3 bg-white border border-slate-200 p-8 rounded-xl

universal_guidelines: Use 'Inter' for body text and UI elements.
Primary CTA buttons must always be Amber-500 or Slate-900.
Forms must use high-contrast inputs with clear labels.
Dashboard must distinguish clearly between 'Pro' (Dense data) and 'Particulier' (Simple view).
All price displays must be large and bold.
Status badges: Pending (Yellow/Amber), Confirmed (Blue), Delivering (Purple), Delivered (Green).
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup: Install fonts (Barlow Condensed) in index.html or CSS.
2. Theme: Implement the color palette in tailwind.config.js specifically extending 'colors'.
3. Auth: Create a split login screen (Left: Branding/Image, Right: Form).
4. Dashboard: Build the Sidebar component first, then the Layout wrapper.
5. Order Form: Use a 'Step Wizard' pattern (Step 1: Quantity/Type, Step 2: Address, Step 3: Date, Step 4: Review).
6. Interactive: Use Framer Motion for slight hover lifts on cards and step transitions.
7. Mobile: Ensure the order form is full-width and touch-friendly on mobile.
8. Language: ENSURE ALL TEXT IS IN FRENCH.
